title: Spirituals at today's lunch hour concert
description: GEORGE NEWS - The lunch hour spring concerts...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The lunch hour spring concerts are in full swing with the third in the series taking place at the Dutch Reformed Mother Church today.


> Spirituals will be the theme of the day as sopranos Lida de Villiers and Alma Oosthuizen treat the audience to a delightful selection from this beloved genre. They will be accompanied on the piano by Drini Botha.


All three of these artists are well-known musicians in George who have delighted numerous audiences with their art.

The lunch hour concerts start at 13:10 and finish at about 13:50. Entrance is free, but donations are always welcome.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
